---
title: "Exercise 1.1"
---

## Problem

State the exercise in your own words or quote only the minimum necessary
to identify it.

> *Understanding Analysis*, Chapter 1, Exercise 1.1.

---

## Solution

Write your proof here.

$$
\ldots
$$

---

## Remarks

- Why does this proof work?
- Is there a shorter proof?
- What theorem is this preparing us for?

---

← Previous (none)

[Chapter 1](../../chapters/chapter-01.qmd)

[Exercise 1.2](ex-1-2.qmd) →
